border.translate: граница, бордюр, край, кайма, ободок, фриз, граничить, окаймлять, обшивать, походить
mnemonic: border [бо':дэ] граница, бордюр - Враги (бода-ют) наши границы.

examples.eng: What countries border Italy?
This sign marks the border.
He was killed by the boarder guards.
The Czech border
We crossed the state border hours ago.
examples.ru: Мы пересекли государственную границу несколько часов назад.

examples.eng: The border extends to the river.
Troops were sent to secure the border.
examples.ru: Войска были отправлены на защиту границ.

examples.eng: Two rivers border the city.
Your remarks border on rudeness.
The town is right on the border.
Their property borders the park.
The forest extends beyond the border.
The fields are bordered by large forests.
The border guards asked to see my papers.
I planted the border with roses.
We were stopped by border guards.
He fled across the border to freedom.
examples.ru: Он бежал через границу на свободу.

examples.eng: The two countries share a long border.
Tall trees border the avenue.
The rug had a wide blue border.
examples.ru: Ковёр был с широкой синей каймой.

examples.eng: The country has a porous border.
examples.ru: У этой страны — легко проницаемая /дырявая, прозрачная/ граница.

examples.eng: a broad red border on each plate
examples.ru: широкая красная кайма на каждой тарелке

examples.eng: Our neighbours bordering about us.
examples.ru: Территория наших соседей соприкасается с нашей территорией.

examples.eng: The border guards waved us through.
Their army unit guarded the border.
a path bordered by a high brick wall
Authorities plan to seal the border.
The border is patrolled by the army.
This trail was parallel to the border.
The soldiers marched across the border.
